description:
Top-down human pose estimation using RTMPose (Apache-2.0) via the rtmlib ONNX wrapper. 
RTMDet-nano performs person detection first, then RTMPose predicts 17 COCO keypoints per person crop. 
Image or document in; annotated frame out with the per-person keypoint array attached to the document's metadata. 
v1 is human-only (Sapiens deferred pending license review).

input.description: AVI image stream to run pose estimation on.

output.description: Annotated image as raw stream - skeleton + keypoint overlay.
JSON array of persons: [{label: 'person', box, keypoints: [{name, x, y, score}, ...]}].

max_persons.description: Cap on persons retained per frame (sorted by detection score). Limits memory + compute on crowd scenes.
max_persons.title: Max persons per frame

threshold.description: Minimum per-keypoint confidence (0.0–1.0). Keypoints below this score are skipped when drawing the skeleton.
threshold.title: Keypoint score threshold

title: Pose Estimation
